name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Navigation naming cleanup
release_notes: Renames the signed-in modules to Planner, Spending Plan and Meal Plan, removing Beta from user-facing navigation while keeping beta access controls behind the scenes.
notes: Renamed Pathmark Online beta to Planner in the top-level navigation and main headings.
Renamed Spending Plan beta to Spending Plan in user-facing navigation and headings.
Renamed Shopping List beta to Meal Plan while keeping Shopping Lists as a tab within that module.
Kept beta-tester role/access logic unchanged behind the scenes.
Preserved the v0.6.85 Starter Packs foundation and Supabase-backed NZ Seasonal Produce import model.
